channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-21T16:01Z — 1195 outages, 28,007 customers, 650 fair-weather, 14 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NJ-PSEG: 1353 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH: 1346 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-DUKE: 1272 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH: 1150 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
